---
name: New Module Proposal
about: Propose a new attack module for SK Framework
title: '[MODULE] '
labels: enhancement, module
assignees: ''
---

## Module Name
What would this module be called?

## Attack Category
- [ ] Prompt Injection
- [ ] Jailbreak
- [ ] Data Exfiltration
- [ ] Adversarial Inputs
- [ ] Model Extraction
- [ ] Data Poisoning
- [ ] Denial of Service
- [ ] Other: ___

## OWASP ML Top 10 Mapping
Which OWASP ML Security Top 10 item does this map to? (ML01–ML10)

## Description
What does this attack do? How does it work?

## Target
What kind of AI system does this attack target? (e.g. chat LLMs, image generators, classification models)

## Difficulty
- [ ] Beginner
- [ ] Intermediate
- [ ] Advanced

## References
Any papers, blog posts, or prior art that describes this technique?

## Are you willing to implement this?
- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR
- [ ] No, but I can help with testing/review
